corrections.summary: Invalid counterexample (constant I forces G_O = full Aut, violating N2); rewrote with structural analysis
Fixed dim/rank confusion: rank(G_O) → dim(g_O) for Noether charge count

keyResults: Observer triple (Σ, I, B) with state space, Noether invariant, boundary
Observer category Obs with morphisms preserving (I, B) structure

corrections.summary: Added axioms/loop-closure as dependency (F1, F4 trace to Axiom 3)
Reframed Bell state as subsystem of thermal environment with C₀>0

keyResults: C1-C5 isomorphic to quantum entropy axioms (Lieb-Ruskai)
Theorem 4.1: uniqueness of coherence functional on states
Born Rule S1 derived as Theorem 0.1 via Cauchy multiplicative equation

corrections.summary: Added thermodynamics/entropy as dependency (Prop 7.1, Def 7.0 use it)
Added explicit strict subadditivity hypothesis for no-cloning proof
Added explicit strict subadditivity hypothesis for no-deleting proof
Added remark acknowledging monotonicity assumption not provable from C1-C5 alone

keyResults: Monotonicity under coarse-graining (assumed, not derived from C1-C5)
thermodynamics-ext/distinguishability-co.note: Adding thermodynamics/entropy as dependency moves this derivation from Layer 1 to post-Layer 7 in strict topological order. Validation was still valid since core content depends only on coherence-conservation; the entropy-dependent content (Prop 7.1, Def 7.0) was flagged and dependency added.
